CONTENT.Club career: Lind was born in Løgumkloster and was part of the SønderjyskE academy, before moving to FC Midtjylland in 2018.He made his professional debut for Midtjylland on the 28 July 2021, coming on as a substitute during the Champions League qualifying 2–1 home win against Celtic, that saw them reach the next round. On 29 January 2023, Lind joined Swedish club IFK Norrköping on a year-long loan deal. On 31 January 2024, Lind was once again loaned out, this time to Danish Superliga side Vejle Boldklub for the rest of the season. After finishing his loan spell, Heiselberg returned to Midtjylland.

SUMMARY: Victor Stange Lind (born 12 July 2003) is a Danish professional footballer who plays for Danish Superliga side FC Midtjylland.
